text:
Fix: 1) repo copy
2) delete all files in the files/ dir except the news in the vde2.shar

should be portlint clean

I'm not sure if you want to make net/vde and net/vde2 I'm fine either way.

There are some new commandline options in 2.x and not all of them are back compat.
